user_message:
You are running as part of compound-engineering:ce-doc-review. Review the document `docs/plans/2026-06-20-002-docs-comprehensive-project-manual-plan.md`.

Document type: plan
Origin: none
Decision primer: <prior-decisions>Round 1 — no prior decisions.</prior-decisions>

Return ONLY valid JSON with keys: reviewer, findings, residual_risks, deferred_questions. Findings must use severity P0/P1/P2/P3, finding_type error/omission, autofix_class safe_auto/gated_auto/manual, confidence 50/75/100 only, and evidence as an array of direct quotes from the document. Suppress style-only or speculative findings. Focus only on scope fit, unnecessary complexity, right-sizing, and whether every work package earns its keep.
